sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂק

Transliteration: śaq

Phonetic: sak

BDB Definition:

  1. mesh, sackcloth, sack, sacking
    1. sack (for grain)
    2. sackcloth
      1. worn in mourning or humiliation
      2. same material spread out to lie on

Origin: from H8264

TWOT entry: 2282a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
